sum: Merging two kit mods (Shaman Hauler and Improved Monk). This mod also offers an upgrade to the Wizard Slayer kit with a passive ability and new HLA, the Beastmaster, which greatly improves the inte...
no: Monk and class kit improvements. Adds Drunken Master monk kit, improved monk/wizard slayer/beastmaster, shaman hauler, dragon disciple dual-class. FORBID_COMPONENT on improvedMonk and ImprovedWizardSlayer standalone mods. English and Simplified Chinese.

passive.desc: +2 AC vs weapons while intoxicated. Immune to movement effects (Haste/Slow/Hold). Resistant to mental effects.

activated.effects: Sip wine to activate stances (10 levels). Each sip unlocks combat styles: Lu Dongbin (bonus dmg), Zhongli Quan (knockback), Han Xiangzi (blindness), Cao Guojiu (instant death), etc.

restrictions.items: No Magic Resistance. No movement speed bonus. No poison/disease/charm immunity. No Stunning Fist or Quivering Palm. No standard monk HLAs.

hlaPool.note: Custom HLA pool: no standard monk HLAs. Gains Unleashed Wine Power, Liquor's Numbness, Whale's Draught, Clarity in the Cup.

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting. No Stunning Fist or Quivering Palm.

restrictions.items: No Lay On Hands. No Stunning Blow. No Quivering Palm. No standard monk HLAs.

hlaPool.note: Custom HLA pool: Solar Stance, Lunar Stance, Dragon Fist, Tiger Strike, Hand of Murder, Resist Project.

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting. No Lay On Hands, Stunning Blow, or Quivering Palm.

new: Monk variant with unpredictable combat style and alcohol-fueled abilities.
Enhanced monk as a new kit with revised abilities and progression.

co.n: Only improves the base class monk with no kit
Improves all monk kits, including installed monk kit MODs
Work as a new kit, the Honed Monk
Allowing monks to become Specialized (2 slots) with allowed weapons
Allowing monks to become Grand Master (5 slots) with allowed weapons
Allowing all bare-handed skills (e.g. Stunning Blow and Quivering Palm) of monks to be effective also on melee weapons. Supports monk kit MODs installed already
Allows Wizard Slayers to use potions normally
Allows Wizard Slayers to wear bracers, belts, cloaks, and all items unusable by mages but equippable by pure-class warriors
Enables manual control of Shaman-summoned spirits for a certain degree, and the shaman can immediately stop dancing to perform other actions
Dragon Disciple Reincarnation (Transforms into specified class and kit, disables original spellcasting, retains passive draconic traits: AC bonuses, Constitution, fire resistance, etc.)
Overhauls Dragon Disciple's passive progression rewards to align with 3rd Edition rules
